info.title: Claims Intake Agent
info.description: Validates healthcare claims — checks member eligibility, procedure code format, and duplicate detection before forwarding to the Adjudication Agent.

post.summary: Submit a message to the Claims Intake Agent

example.message: Process claim CLM-A001 for member M-1001, procedure 99213, billed $130, service date 2024-05-10
Claim CLM-A001 has passed intake validation. Member M-1001 is active on Gold PPO. Procedure 99213 is valid. No duplicate found. Forwarding to adjudication.

message.description: Natural language message to the agent describing the claim to process.

sessionId.description: Optional session identifier for multi-turn conversations.

message.description: Agent's natural language response including validation outcome and decision rationale.
